# Ignite Studio

> Ignite Studio is a digital marketing agency that helps small and local businesses grow through high-converting web design, SEO, paid advertising, branding, and social media marketing. We report on revenue, not vanity metrics, and every engagement starts with a free audit.

## About
Ignite Studio is a full-service digital marketing agency based in Austin, TX, serving small businesses across Texas. We combine design, search, and paid media under one roof so campaigns work together instead of in silos. Clients get a dedicated strategist, monthly revenue-focused reporting, and no long lock-in contracts.

## Services
- [Web Design & Development](https://ignitestudio.com/web-design.html): Fast, mobile-first websites built to convert visitors into customers. Projects typically $4,000–$12,000 one-time.
- [Search Engine Optimization (SEO)](https://ignitestudio.com/seo.html): Local and organic SEO that helps small businesses rank on Google and get cited by AI search. Plans $1,500–$3,500/month.
- [Paid Advertising](https://ignitestudio.com/paid-ads.html): Google and Meta ad campaigns engineered for measurable return on ad spend. Management $1,000–$2,500/month plus ad budget.
- [Branding & Identity](https://ignitestudio.com/branding.html): Logos, brand systems, and messaging that make businesses memorable. Projects $3,500–$8,000 one-time.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://ignitestudio.com/social-media.html): Content and community management that grows a loyal audience. Plans $1,200–$3,000/month.
- [Content & Copywriting](https://ignitestudio.com/content.html): Words that rank on search, get cited by AI assistants, and drive action. Plans $1,200–$2,800/month.

## Pricing plans
- Spark — from $1,500/month: one channel done properly (SEO, ads, or social) with monthly revenue reporting.
- Blaze — from $3,000/month (most popular): web + SEO + one paid channel working together.
- Wildfire — from $6,000/month: the full growth engine including content and social.
All plans start with a free audit: https://ignitestudio.com/#pricing

## Case studies
- [Rooted Coffee Co.](https://ignitestudio.com/case-rooted-coffee.html): Web rebuild + local SEO → +184% organic traffic in 5 months, 3.1x more direction requests.
- [Summit Home Services](https://ignitestudio.com/case-summit-home.html): Rebuilt paid-ads account → 4.6x return on ad spend, cost per lead down 38%.
- [Bloom Botanicals](https://ignitestudio.com/case-bloom-botanicals.html): Rebrand + e-commerce + social → +312% online revenue year over year.

## Blog
- [The Local SEO Checklist Every Small Business Should Run](https://ignitestudio.com/blog-local-seo.html): Seven highest-payoff local SEO tasks — Google Business Profile, NAP consistency, reviews, local pages, speed, schema, local links.
- [5 Signs Your Website Is Costing You Customers](https://ignitestudio.com/blog-website-signs.html): Measurable failure signs — load speed, mobile experience, calls to action, proof, and conversion tracking.
- Blog index: https://ignitestudio.com/blog.html

## Key facts
- Specialty: Small and local businesses.
- 250+ projects launched.
- Average return on ad spend: 3.2x.
- Client retention: 98%.
- Average client rating: 4.9 out of 5 (212 reviews).
- Pricing: Most small-business clients invest $1,500–$6,000/month. Every relationship begins with a free audit.

## Common questions
- How much does digital marketing cost for a small business? Most clients invest $1,500–$6,000 per month; a free audit scopes the plan first. Per-service cost ranges are published on each service page.
- How long until results? Paid ads can drive traffic within days; SEO typically shows meaningful movement in 3 to 6 months.
- What makes Ignite Studio different? Design, SEO, and paid media under one roof, revenue-based reporting, a dedicated strategist, published pricing, and no lock-in contracts.
